rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow members to register themselves.
The system shall permit authorized members to borrow books from the book bank.
The system shall enable members to reserve books or magazines that are not currently available.
The system shall allow the book bank to create, replace, and delete information about titles, members, and reservations.
The system shall maintain a database to track the status and issue of borrowed books.
The system shall categorize books by department, general, and year of study.
The system shall use a bar scanner chip to track the location of books and notify administrators if a book is misplaced.
The system shall provide sign-in, login, and logout functionality for users.
The system shall enable the storage and retrieval of books.
The system shall allow users to purchase books.
The system shall enable the updating of stock levels.
The system shall calculate due fines for overdue books.
The system shall support e-book functionality.
The system shall enable payment processing for book purchases.
The system shall allow the maintenance of book records.
The system shall generate sales reports for book transactions.
The system shall manage user records and sorting.

source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The book bank management is a software in which a member can register themselves and then he can borrow books from the book bank or the members can buy the books from the book bank.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Authorized members can borrow books from the book bank
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A Book Bank lends books and magazines to member, who is registered in the system. It mainly concentrates on providing the book for authorized members only.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Members can reserve a book or magazine that is not currently available
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A member can reserve a book or magazine that is not currently available in the book bank, so that when it is returned or purchased by the book bank, that person is notified.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The book bank can create, replace and delete information about titles, members and reservations
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The book bank can easily create, replace and delete information about the titles, members and reservations from the system.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Lending books requires maintaining a database for status and issue of the book
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In the case of lending, we should maintain the database for the status and issue of the book and also we have to calculate the fine amount with respect to the due date.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Books can be maintained according to department, general, and year of study
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: We should maintain the book according to the department, generals, and year of study.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can scan books using a bar scanner chip and notify admin if a book is misplaced
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: if the user takes the book and misplace it on another shelf, then we have the chip of bar scanner to scan the books and indicate to the admin that the book has been replaced.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Sign in, Login, Log out functionality is required
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The main functionality of the system is that Sign in, Login, Log out...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Book storing and retrieval functionality is required
Book for buying functionality is required
Due fine calculation functionality is required
Sales report generation functionality is required
User records management functionality is required
